thesis: Catalyst/process: Rebalance is not permitted today by policy (spacing gate). Use the day to validate fundamentals/estimates snapshots and scan for acute thesis breaks; in this run’s tool slice, equity headlines are UNKNOWN, so we default to risk control via no turnover.

Factor edge (30d horizon): Pack leadership remains GLD/XOM/LMT/TSM (strong momentum + trend), and the current portfolio already expresses that mix with ballast (GLD/XOM/LMT) plus selective semis (TSM/NVDA/AVGO).

Variant view: In mixed regimes, minimizing unnecessary churn can dominate—hold the leaders and only rotate out of laggards (META/AVGO if confirmed) at the next eligible rebalance when qualitative evidence is clearer.
risks: Macro: If mixed regime snaps to risk-off, semis (NVDA/AVGO/TSM) can gap lower; mitigants (GLD/XOM/LMT) are diversifiers but not full hedges.

Idiosyncratic: News for the 7-day window is UNKNOWN in the provided tool output; residual headline risk remains (regulatory/AI competition for META; product-cycle/customer concentration for AVGO; geopolitics for TSM).
Execution/liquidity: None today (no trade). Next eligible rebalance should still assume staged execution in higher-vol names (NVDA/LLY/AVGO/TSM).
falsifiable_checks: By next eligible rebalance (>=7 days): if META mom remains <0 and underperforms SPY by >=3pp over that interval (pack-based), elevate to Replace candidate (subject to qualitative confirmation).

Risk trigger (next 30 days): if AVGO experiences an additional >=10% peak-to-trough drawdown from today (pack drawdown when available) while QQQ MA50 remains false, pre-plan a size reduction at the next checkpoint.
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: Mixed regime + rebalance gate forces discipline; expected edge from trading today is low vs turnover drag. Bull: Leadership persistence (GLD/TSM/LMT/XOM) continues and current positioning captures it without churn. Bear: A negative catalyst emerges (news UNKNOWN); best response is monitoring and acting at the next eligible rebalance with confirmed information and controlled turnover.

Execution plan: no trades today; next eligible rebalance use staged orders in NVDA/AVGO/TSM; keep turnover <=3 changes unless tool-verified thesis break. Monitoring/kill-switch: META underperform SPY by >=3pp over next eligible window + mom<0; AVGO addl >=10% drawdown with QQQ MA50=false; any tool-verified negative guidance/earnings surprise (news window) triggers review.
